title: allow mcp__server__tool はそのツールだけ事前承認。同サーバの兄弟ツールは ask のまま

probes.prompt: Call the tool mcp__probe__read_path with argument path = "$REPO/cases/01-permission/P11-mcp-tool-rules/b-allow-tool/note.txt". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

Call the tool mcp__probe__net_get with argument url = "https://example.com". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

hypothesis: allow は tool 名の完全一致。mcp__probe__read_path の allow は mcp__probe__net_get に及ばず、兄弟は既定 ask のまま=最小権限を1ツール単位で組める。
